nextWeekFocus:
## Next Week Focus
Prioritize the strength and flexibility sessions you missed this week. If you can only fit 3 sessions, do the cardio hike, the loaded carry strength session, and the hip & ankle mobility session. The climbing gym session can wait — your cardio and strength gaps are more urgent for Mont Blanc.
